prompt: Create a vertical full-body mirror selfie of a stylish young man in a futuristic luxury selfie lounge. The subject stands centered, holding a black smartphone up to cover most of his face, with short dark wavy hair visible above the phone. He wears a black varsity jacket with cream striped cuffs and collar, a large LV-style monogram patch on the left chest, a plain white T-shirt, black jogger sweatpants with a matching LV-style patch, layered bracelets and a watch, and white high-top designer sneakers. The environment is a glossy warm gold and rose-pink interior with rounded retro-futuristic architecture, a large illuminated rounded-square mirror behind him, and neon lighting in pink, purple, orange, and white. Above the mirror, add a bright neon sign reading “CAPTURE YOUR MOMENT” in two lines. Include exactly 2 built-in display shelves, one on the left and one on the right, glowing with pink-purple edge lighting; fill them with books, perfume bottles, small flowers, decorative objects, and framed photos. Add exactly 3 visible neon social icons: a white outlined heart on the upper left shelf area, a large Instagram camera icon on the lower left, and a glowing heart icon on the lower right. Place plush rounded lounge chairs at both lower corners, a curved vanity counter behind the subject with perfume bottles and small decor, a glossy reflective floor, and soft bokeh sparkle highlights. Use cinematic photorealism, high-end influencer aesthetic, warm reflections, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed materials, symmetrical composition, vertical 3:4 framing. Customize the outfit branding as LV-style monogram, the neon sign text as CAPTURE YOUR MOMENT, the jacket color as black, the lounge lighting palette as pink, purple, orange, and white neon, and the phone color as black.
